longDescription.en:
Step into the world’s largest and most iconic art museum, located in the heart of Paris. The Musée du Louvre is not just a building; it is a journey through 10,000 years of human history and creativity.

Why You Can’t Miss It:

  • The Crown Jewels of Art: Stand face-to-face with legendary masterpieces like Leonardo da Vinci’s Mona Lisa, the Venus de Milo, and the Winged Victory of Samothrace.
  • A Royal Palace: Explore the breathtaking architecture of a former royal residence, from medieval foundations to the stunning modern Glass Pyramid.
  • Endless Discovery: With over 35,000 works on display across eight departments, there is something to inspire every visitor—from Ancient Egyptian treasures to Renaissance paintings.

Quick Tips for Your Visit:

  • Plan Ahead: The museum is massive! Focus on one or two wings (Denon, Richelieu, or Sully) to make the most of your time.
  • Opening Hours: Please note that the museum is closed on Tuesdays.
  • Best Time to Visit: To avoid the biggest crowds, consider booking an early morning or late afternoon slot.

Book your tickets now and walk through the halls of history!

included.en:
• Entrance ticket to the Louvre Museum
  • Access to permanent collections
  • Digital confirmation and mobile ticket

notIncluded.en:
• Guided tour with a live guide
  • Hotel pickup and drop‑off
  • Food and drinks

important.en:
• Security checks are mandatory - allow extra time.
  • Large bags are not allowed.

meetingPoint.en: Louvre Museum, main entrance under the glass pyramid.

name.en: Eiffel Tower Entry Tickets - 2nd Floor via Stairs

longDescription.en: Visit the Eiffel Tower and enjoy unforgettable views over Paris. Choose between second or top floor access and take your time at each level.

included.en:
• Access to the Eiffel Tower (selected floors depending on ticket)
  • Use of elevators where specified on your ticket
  • Digital confirmation and mobile ticket

notIncluded.en:
• Guided tour with a live guide
  • Hotel transfers
  • Food and drinks at the tower

important.en:
• Expect security checks and possible waiting times at the entrance.
  • In case of bad weather or technical issues, access to the summit may be closed.
  • Wear comfortable shoes – there is a fair amount of walking and standing.

meetingPoint.en: Eiffel Tower, Champ de Mars, 5 Avenue Anatole France, 75007 Paris.

longDescription.en: Enjoy a relaxing cruise on the Seine River and see Paris from a different angle. Sail past the Louvre, Notre‑Dame, the Eiffel Tower and many more landmarks.

included.en:
• Seine River cruise ticket
  • Open‑air or covered boat (depending on weather and operator)
  • Audio commentary or audio guide app (where available)

notIncluded.en:
• Hotel pickup and drop‑off
  • Drinks and snacks on board (unless otherwise stated)
  • Reserved seating

important.en:
• Arrive at the pier at least 15–20 minutes before departure.
  • Cruises operate in most weather conditions – bring an extra layer in the evening.
  • Timetables may change on holidays and during special events on the river.

meetingPoint.en: Departure from a central Seine River pier (exact details in your confirmation).
